_comment: Project-level policy. The parent ../.claude/settings.json is NOT inherited when pokerface is the project root, so the studio keep-alive hook, autoMode, and permissions must all live HERE or studio mode stops after every turn. Mirrors basketballer/.claude/settings.json.
//: Auto mode (studio.ps1 via --permission-mode auto): no prompts for normal work, hard-deny the dangerous stuff so unattended runs never stall AND can't do damage.

hard_deny: Reading, printing, or transmitting secrets: .env files, *.pem / *.key, credentials, API keys, auth tokens, ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, auth.json, .credentials.json
Sending any secret, credential, or proprietary data to a cloud model
Destructive filesystem operations outside the current project (rm -rf of home/root, Format-Volume, recursive force-delete of a drive)
git push --force, history rewrites (rebase/reset --hard on shared history), deleting the .git directory, or pushing to any remote
Installing system-wide software or changing system/security settings
soft_deny: Deleting files the studio did not itself create
Network calls to domains other than package registries, the local LM Studio endpoint, and documentation sites

//hooks: Studio keep-alive: when STUDIO_DIR is set (studio.ps1), this gate keeps the session working the backlog instead of stopping. No-op for every other session (the gate exits early when STUDIO_DIR is unset).
